name: Canary 24x24 Garage Shed Plan - A Two-Bay Garage with Classic Craftsmanship
open_features: A spacious dual-bay design ideal for parking vehicles, storing tools, or creating a large workshop area.
Straightforward framing, clear roof geometry, and beginner-friendly plans make this an accessible project for any builder.
A traditional paneled overhead garage door provides smooth entry for cars, equipment, and large storage items.
Warm horizontal lap siding, crisp white trim, and cottage-style lantern lighting give the Canary its signature charm.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Canary Garage Shed Plan - a 24x24 multi-purpose garage and workspace solution designed for efficiency, durability, and timeless curb appeal. Featuring a steep gable roof, warm golden wood siding, and clean white trim, the Canary blends classic barn charm with modern functionality. Whether you're building a two-vehicle garage, home workshop, equipment storage hub, or a flexible utility building, the Canary 24x24 offers generous interior space, DIY-...
